name: Claremont McKenna College
meets_full_need_notes: CMC meets 100% of demonstrated financial need for all admitted domestic students.
no_loan_notes: CMC eliminated loans from all financial aid packages. All aid awarded as grants. Families with income under $80,000 pay no tuition; families under $150,000 receive substantial grant aid.

merit_thresholds.notes: CMC offers merit scholarships including the CMC Merit Award for exceptional students. Merit consideration is built into the holistic admissions process; no separate application typically required.

ed_aid_implications: ED applicants receive the same aid as RD. Aid package released with admission; binding commitment may be reconsidered if aid is inadequate.
appeal_policy: CMC reviews appeals for changed financial circumstances. Students contact Student Financial Services for professional judgment consideration.
